pack_action_hints.anchors: Fix naming, duplicates, or expected anchor coverage before the next rack or integration review.
pack_action_hints.constants: Compare Pivot Master, Module_constants, and scene/export values before handoff so constants drift is visible early.
pack_action_hints.carpaints: Clean the carpaint payload so IDs, names, ranges, and finish values are stable before review.
pack_action_hints.project_sanity: Fix workspace, reference, or environment problems early so later rack and integration steps are not blocked.

anchors.missing_expected.action: Add the missing expected anchors in the RES_AnchorPoints scene or update the rules for this car.

anchors.invalid_name.action: Rename the anchor to match the SG naming convention before export.

anchors.position_mismatch.action: Align the encoded anchor name with the actual scene position so downstream compositor logic stays deterministic.

anchors.duplicate_name.action: Remove or rename duplicate anchors so the anchor scene has one unambiguous source per anchor.

constants.out_of_tolerance.action: Check Pivot Master generation, Module_constants, and linked scene logic for drift or incorrect mapping.

constants.exact_mismatch.action: Correct the car identity mismatch so the constants bundle stays traceable.

constants.exported_key_missing.action: Restore the missing Module_constants value or adjust the normalization rules so the exported key is emitted.

carpaints.duplicate_unique_value.action: Resolve duplicate IDs or names so carpaint review and integration use a single stable identity.

carpaints.invalid_finish.action: Normalize the finish type to the supported set before the paint data is handed off.

carpaints.out_of_range.action: Clamp or correct the offending value so the carpaint payload stays inside the expected numeric range.

carpaints.missing_key.action: Fill the missing required paint fields before the payload is reused by downstream tooling.

project_sanity.onedrive_root.action: Move the project out of OneDrive before further rack, emulator, or integration work.

project_sanity.onedrive_path.action: Replace OneDrive-backed references with local repo or workspace paths before handoff.

project_sanity.suspicious_absolute_path.action: Replace ad-hoc absolute paths with repo-relative or approved workspace paths.

project_sanity.cross_brand_reference.action: Review whether the reference should really point across brands; if not, relink it to the correct BMW/MINI-side asset.

project_sanity.cross_car_reference.action: Review whether the reference should really point to another car model; if not, relink it to the current car or a shared asset.

project_sanity.missing_env_var.action: Set the required SG environment variables so existing Ramses Composer scripts resolve the right roots.

project_sanity.unused_lua.action: Confirm whether the Lua file is intentionally unused; delete it or wire it into the project if needed.

project_sanity.raco_version_not_recommen.action: Switch to a recommended RaCo version or explicitly document why this project requires a different one.

project_sanity.gltf_topology_drift.action: Check whether the glTF object-count change is intentional because hot reload and integration stability may be affected.

project_sanity.gltf_object_set_changed.action: Review added and removed objects before integration so downstream consumers do not break unexpectedly.

project_sanity.gltf_reorder.action: Keep object order stable if downstream tooling depends on import ordering.

project_sanity.missing_report_context.action: Add report context such as car model, trim, delivery phase, and review target so the findings can be handed off cleanly.
